opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability on site.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered, sending urgent leads straight to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI chat scheduling on site to capture and book jobs 24/7 without phone dependency.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact means zero digital lead tracking.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves no record, making follow-up and revenue recovery impossible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with automatic CRM logging to capture every inbound lead and caller detail.

opportunities.label: Customer Reactivation Campaign
opportunities.signal: 154 reviews suggest a sizeable customer base but no email marketing or follow-up tools detected.
opportunities.observation: Years of past Boise customers sit dormant with no automated outreach to drive repeat plumbing jobs.
opportunities.fix: Use AI-driven SMS and email sequences to re-engage past customers with seasonal plumbing offers.
